moods.label: Excited
moods.sampleText: Wait — wait — you have to hear what just happened, this is going to change everything!

moods.label: Calm
moods.sampleText: Take a breath. Sit with this for a moment. There is no rush, and nothing is wrong.

moods.label: Sarcastic
moods.sampleText: Oh sure — because that always works out beautifully every single time. Just brilliant.

moods.label: Happy
moods.sampleText: I have to say, it really is a good day, and this is the kind of moment I will remember.

moods.label: Sad
moods.sampleText: I didn't think it would feel like this. I really didn't think it would land this hard.

moods.label: Sinister
moods.sampleText: You don't have to look at me. You'll feel it soon enough — there's no need to hurry.

moods.label: Heroic
moods.sampleText: Stand up. Hold the line. Whatever else fails today, we will not — not on my watch.

moods.label: Whispered
moods.sampleText: Listen carefully. I'm only going to say this once, and you can't repeat it to anyone.

moods.label: Commanding
moods.sampleText: On your feet. Eyes forward. We move in three minutes — there will be no more questions.

moods.label: Fearful
moods.sampleText: I don't think we should be here. Something is wrong, and I don't want to find out what.

moods.label: Angry
moods.sampleText: No. We are not having this conversation again. I am done explaining, and I am done being patient.

moods.label: Tender
moods.sampleText: Hey. I see you. You don't have to carry this on your own — not today, and not with me.

moods.label: Confident
moods.sampleText: We've done harder than this before, and we'll do it again. I know what we're walking into.

moods.label: Confused
moods.sampleText: Wait, hold on — that doesn't add up. How did we get from there to here? Run that past me again.

moods.label: Mysterious
moods.sampleText: The answer was sitting in the room the whole time. You just weren't ready to look for it.

moods.label: Playful
moods.sampleText: Oh, you thought I was kidding? That is adorable. We are absolutely doing this — buckle up.

moods.label: Exhausted
moods.sampleText: Look. I'll do it. I will. I just need ten more seconds before I can stand up again.

moods.label: Determined
moods.sampleText: Whatever it takes. I don't care how long it takes. We finish what we started — every time.

moods.label: Mocking
moods.sampleText: Oh, no, please — go on. I am hanging on your every word. This is incredibly important.

moods.label: Reverent
moods.sampleText: Some things you don't measure. You just stand there, you listen, and you let them be what they are.
